requirement_topic.en: IEC 62196 vs GB/T 20234 Connector Standard — Critical Hardware Gap
requirement_topic.zh: IEC 62196与GB/T 20234接口标准——关键硬件差距
requirement_topic.zht: IEC 62196與GB/T 20234接口標準——關鍵硬體差距

summary.en: Algeria does not use China GB/T connector practice as a domestic baseline. For IEC-aligned charging infrastructure, AC charging should be specified around IEC 62196-2 Type 2 connectors and DC fast charging around IEC 62196-3 CCS Combo 2 connectors. The connector choice must be confirmed in the IANOR conformity, project tender, vehicle-fleet, and charge-point-operator requirements for the specific deployment. Any charger supplied with a fixed cable or socket must match the vehicle connector ecosystem selected for Algeria.
summary.zh: 阿尔及利亚并不以中国GB/T接口实践作为国内基线。对于IEC体系充电基础设施，交流充电应围绕IEC 62196-2 Type 2接口规格，直流快充应围绕IEC 62196-3 CCS Combo 2接口规格。具体部署的接口选择须在IANOR合格评定、项目招标、车辆车队和充电点运营商要求中确认。任何配备固定电缆或插座的充电设备都必须匹配阿尔及利亚所选车辆接口生态。
summary.zht: 阿爾及利亞並不以中國GB/T接口實踐作為國內基線。對於IEC體系充電基礎設施，交流充電應圍繞IEC 62196-2 Type 2接口規格，直流快充應圍繞IEC 62196-3 CCS Combo 2接口規格。具體部署的接口選擇須在IANOR合格評定、項目招標、車輛車隊和充電點運營商要求中確認。任何配備固定電纜或插座的充電設備都必須匹配阿爾及利亞所選車輛接口生態。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62196-1 (general requirements for plugs, socket-outlets, vehicle connectors, and vehicle inlets)
IANOR Algerian standards and conformity practice for electrical equipment

summary.en: Chinese EV chargers commonly use GB/T 20234.1, GB/T 20234.2 for AC connectors, and GB/T 20234.3 for DC connectors. These connectors are physically and electrically incompatible with IEC 62196 Type 2 and CCS Combo 2. China domestic connector compliance, tooling, labels, and test reports cannot be relabelled into IEC 62196 compliance for Algeria.
summary.zh: 中国电动汽车充电设备通常采用GB/T 20234.1、GB/T 20234.2交流接口和GB/T 20234.3直流接口。这些接口与IEC 62196 Type 2和CCS Combo 2在物理和电气上不兼容。中国国内接口合规、模具、标签和测试报告不能重新贴标为阿尔及利亚IEC 62196合规。
summary.zht: 中國電動汽車充電設備通常採用GB/T 20234.1、GB/T 20234.2交流接口和GB/T 20234.3直流接口。這些接口與IEC 62196 Type 2和CCS Combo 2在物理和電氣上不兼容。中國國內接口合規、模具、標籤和測試報告不能重新貼標為阿爾及利亞IEC 62196合規。

gap.en: Build a separate Algeria hardware variant with IEC 62196-2 Type 2 for AC or IEC 62196-3 CCS Combo 2 for DC, and test that exact connector variant under IEC 61851. Confirm connector pinout, cable rating, inlet compatibility, marking, and spare-part documentation with the importer or project owner. GB/T connector chargers need a hardware change, not only a documentation change.
gap.zh: 应为阿尔及利亚建立独立硬件型号：交流采用IEC 62196-2 Type 2，直流采用IEC 62196-3 CCS Combo 2，并按IEC 61851测试该确切接口型号。应与进口商或项目业主确认接口针脚、电缆额定值、车辆插座兼容性、标志和备件文件。GB/T接口充电设备需要硬件变更，而不仅是文件变更。
gap.zht: 應為阿爾及利亞建立獨立硬體型號：交流採用IEC 62196-2 Type 2，直流採用IEC 62196-3 CCS Combo 2，並按IEC 61851測試該確切接口型號。應與進口商或項目業主確認接口針腳、電纜額定值、車輛插座兼容性、標誌和備件文件。GB/T接口充電設備需要硬體變更，而不僅是文件變更。

mandatory_status.target: De facto mandatory for IEC-aligned interoperability; exact connector specification should be confirmed with IANOR, the importer, project owner, and charge-point operator
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for Chinese domestic interoperability under GB/T 20234; not accepted as physically compatible with IEC 62196 vehicles

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] This is the critical hardware gap. China GB/T 20234 connectors are physically incompatible with IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2 infrastructure. Algeria-bound chargers should be built and tested as IEC-connector variants, not relabelled GB/T variants.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 这是关键硬件差距。中国GB/T 20234接口与IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2基础设施实体不兼容。面向阿尔及利亚的充电设备应按IEC接口型号制造和测试，而不是对GB/T型号重新贴标。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 這是關鍵硬體差距。中國GB/T 20234接口與IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2基礎設施實體不兼容。面向阿爾及利亞的充電設備應按IEC接口型號製造和測試，而不是對GB/T型號重新貼標。
